sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73837" key="o(/mostic" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὅμο-στιξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιχος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen><sense id="n73837.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"><cit TEIform="cit"><quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">, (στείχὠ</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">walking together,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4093.tlg001:1:319" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Choerob.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Theod.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.319</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> H.</sense> </entryFree>
